name: Consumer Debt Counselors, Inc.
description_short: Consumer Debt Counselors, Inc. is a credit repair provider based in Winter Park, Florida. Rated 4.7/5 with 87 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Consumer Debt Counselors, Inc. is a credit repair provider serving clients in Winter Park, Florida. Carrying a 4.7/5.0 Google rating from 87 reviews, Consumer Debt Counselors, Inc. has an excellent reputation among consumers in the Winter Park area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a non-profit organization, Consumer Debt Counselors, Inc. provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Winter Park, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Consumer Debt Counselors, Inc. operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Winter Park, Florida area who are considering Consumer Debt Counselors, Inc. should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
